home.heroSubtitle: Automated energy management and complete control systems for commercial and residential environments.
home.pillarsSubtitle: Our core philosophy is built on three fundamental pillars designed to transform any building into a smart ecosystem.
home.industriesSubtitle: From luxury hotels to hospitals, our systems scale to any building type.
industry.hotelsDesc: Full room control — lighting, climate, access and energy in one system.
industry.hospitalsDesc: Critical environments demand precision. BAT delivers it.
industry.officesDesc: Smart energy management that pays for itself.
industry.residentialDesc: Comfort and security for modern homes.
pillar.economicDesc: Drastically optimize energy consumption and reduce operational costs with intelligent automated management systems that adapt in real-time.
pillar.comfortDesc: Achieve the perfect environment effortlessly. Our systems continuously monitor and adjust temperature, lighting, and ventilation tailored perfectly to your daily operational needs.
pillar.securityDesc: Control your entire building with a single interface while ensuring maximum security protocols at every level.
home.appsSubtitle: We design and manufacture our own proprietary hardware modules, perfectly synchronized with our advanced FreeDOM software to bring all the technologies of a building together seamlessly.
home.iosSubtitle: A native iOS companion app that puts full control of your building in your pocket — fast, secure, and built to feel right at home on your iPhone.
home.iosFeature1Desc: Unlock the app instantly with Face ID or Touch ID — no passwords to remember.
home.iosFeature2Desc: Push notifications the moment an alarm or sensor needs your attention.
home.iosFeature3Desc: Check temperature, security status and lights without opening the app.
home.iosFeature4Desc: Built natively for iOS — smooth, fast, and battery-friendly.
home.androidTitle: Feels Right at Home on Android
home.androidSubtitle: Built with Material You, our Android app adapts to your device and puts full control of your building one tap away — from the lock screen to the home screen.
home.androidFeature2: Quick Settings tiles for lights & climate
home.androidFeature3: Home screen widgets with live status
home.androidFeature4: Actionable alerts from the lock screen
home.ctaBody: Let's discuss how BAT can bring economy, comfort and security to your project.
home.ctaButton: Get in touch with an expert
home.teaserBody: Supervise, program, and monitor your entire infrastructure in real-time from anywhere on Earth.

freedom.title: FreeDOM Software
freedom.subtitle: The absolute intelligence behind your building. A comprehensive, beautifully designed software suite for programming, supervising, and managing your entire automation infrastructure.
freedom.whatBody: FreeDOM is the software tool for the management of all building modules. It programs and configures the hardware, supervises the installation in real time, and unifies lighting, climate, access and energy into a single, coherent platform.
freedom.featuresSubtitle: FreeDOM provides an unparalleled suite of tools designed specifically for facility managers and system integrators.
freedom.bmsBody: Access live supervision from PC, tablet or smartphone. Dynamic visualisation maps your building so every zone, alarm and measurement is one tap away.
freedom.feat1Desc: Easily configure and program all BAT modules on the network with drag-and-drop simplicity.
freedom.feat2Desc: Monitor the exact state of your building's systems in real-time with zero latency.
freedom.feat3Desc: Track costs and analyze energy consumption with beautiful, exportable reporting dashboards.
freedom.feat4Desc: Precise control over HVAC systems for maximum comfort and extreme energy efficiency.
freedom.feat5Desc: Seamless integration with security and fire alarm systems for automated emergency protocols.
freedom.feat6Desc: Control and monitor your entire building from anywhere via smartphone or tablet.
freedom.desktopSubtitle: The full power of FreeDOM on a wide canvas — built for the engineers and facility managers who run the show from a desk.
freedom.desktopFeature1: Multi-window supervision across every floor and zone simultaneously
freedom.desktopFeature2: Live interactive maps that mirror your building in real time
freedom.desktopFeature3: One-click exportable reports for energy, alarms and usage
freedom.desktopFeature4: Drag-and-drop scene programming, no code required
freedom.uncompromisedDesc: Achieve the perfect environment effortlessly. Our systems continuously monitor and adjust temperature, lighting, and ventilation tailored perfectly to your daily operational needs.
freedom.accessBody: Whether you are at your desk on a PC, walking the floors with a tablet, or off-site with your smartphone, FreeDOM's responsive web interface keeps you perfectly connected.
freedom.accessBullet1: Instant push notifications for every alarm and event
freedom.accessBullet2: Live sync across every device, zero setup required
freedom.accessBullet3: Full control from any browser — no app install needed
about.title: Pioneering Building Automation
about.subtitle: The intelligence behind smarter, safer buildings.
about.storyBody: BAT — Building Automation Transmission (Btg SA) specialises in intelligent building automation. We design and manufacture a complete range of modules that obtain data and control any type of device, uniting all the technologies of a building into one coherent system.
about.missionBody: Our mission is to bring all the isolated technologies of a building together into a single, highly cohesive ecosystem. We don't just automate; we intelligently orchestrate.
about.missionDetails: By developing our own proprietary hardware modules paired with the robust FreeDOM software suite, we offer an unprecedented level of integration, reliability, and flexibility tailored to the exacting demands of modern architecture.
about.adv1Body: A highly robust proprietary communication protocol ensuring flawless, zero-latency data transmission across hundreds of modules.
about.adv2Body: The ultimate supervisor tool. Monitor, configure, and override the entire ecosystem from any device, anywhere in the world.
about.industriesBody: Our highly adaptable systems scale effortlessly, providing tailored automation solutions across a diverse range of critical sectors.
about.busBody: Every module communicates over the robust BAT BUS — a single, scalable wiring backbone that links power, acquisition, control and communication modules. Add or repeat the bus to extend supervision across an entire site.
